Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Shelley K. Tinkoff, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Foster Wheeler LLC.,
Matthew L. Zelasko-Barrett, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Lucille Sapienza
After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
1. Defendant Foster-Wheeler's motion to compel further responses to discovery requests granted in part, denied in part:
a. Plaintiff Lucille Sapienza shall provide verifications for her previous responses to Foster-Wheeler's Special Interrogatories, Requests for Admission, Request for Production of Documents, and Form Interrogatories within ten days of notice of entry of this order;
b. As to defendant Foster-Wheeler's Special Interrogatories nos. 2, 4, 9, 10 and 34, granted; as to Special Interrogatories nos. 3, granted as to site not discussed in previous responses
c. As to defendant Foster-Wheeler's Requests for Admission nos. 5, 6, 9, 10, 12, 13, 14, 16, 18, 22, 25, and 26, granted; as to Requests for Admission nos. 11 and 23, denied without prejudice;
d. As to defendant Foster-Wheeler's Request for Production of Documents nos. 1-3; 5-8; 12-20; and 23-25, granted--plaintiff shall provide case specific responses; As to Request for Production of Documents nos. 21 and 22, denied without prejudice.
e. Any response required by the order shall be verified and served on defendant Foster-Wheeler within twenty days of the date of notice of entry of this order;
2. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $540.00, payable within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, Court Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR # 11055

1. Defendant Bayer Cropscience, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests, And To Compel Plaintiff Louis M. Sapienza's Response To Request For Admissions;
there being no opposition filed, the motion is granted:
a. Plaintiffs Mary Jo Sapienza and Lucille Sapienza shall provide verified, supplemental, code complaint and case specific responses to defendant Amchem's special interrogatories, request for production of documents, request for admissions and form interrogatories;
b. Plaintiff Louis Sapienza shall provide verified, supplemental, code complaint and case specific responses to defendant Amchem's special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and form interrogatories;
c. Plaintiff Louis Sapienza shall provide verified, code compliant responses to defendant Amchem's request for admissions;
d. All responses subject to this order shall be served within ten days of the date of service of this order;
e. In the event that plaintiff Louis Sapienza fails to serve verified responses to defendant Amchem's request for admissions within the time provided in this order, the subject request for admissions shall be deemed admitted, without further order of this court. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
